title: Jade Better Dark Theme
description: A better version of Jade's dark theme made to match with Status Effect Timer or Status Effect Bars.
body:
![Better Dark by Moseybat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd2f8ea2b3bb9e9d891ec7e4fc465adfd77f3586.png)
JBDT is a theme made for Jade to match with Status Effect Timer and/or Status Effect Bars, and also look more simplistic to pair better with Minecraft's style.

This resource pack requires "**Jade 🔍**" by Snownee and "**Mod Menu**" by Prospector to function. 

**For some reason when you install from the Modrinth app, it only installs V2 even if you click V1. To fix this, just install V1 from the website and put it in your "resourcepacks" folder.**
<hr/>

![Comparison between V1 and V2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66c3756c99c05304ec0f980137b5b9da7d08386e.png)

Check the gallery for more images of V1 and V2! **Do not enable resource packs V1 and V2 at the same time.**
<hr/>

Having trouble? Here's how to enable the pack!
1. Add this to your modpack and check you have both required mods.
2. Enable the resource pack "JadeBetterDark"
3. Click the "Mods" button on the main menu or the pause menu and search for Jade.
4. Click on Jade and go to Mod settings > Appearance > Theme and enable Better Dark.
5. Save and quit.
